display_text: Javelin, Cost: 900: Provides a 25% chance on attack to pierce evasion and deal 60 bonus magical damage. This ability makes it an effective early counter against heroes or items that rely on evasion (e.g., Windrun, Butterfly components). It builds into higher-tier physical damage items like Monkey King Bar and provides a crucial offensive advantage. Stats: Pierce Chance: 25%, Bonus Magic Damage: 60.

display_text: Javelin, Cost: 900: Offers no primary attribute bonuses (Strength, Agility, Intelligence) or direct attack damage increase. Its value lies entirely in its passive Pierce ability, making it a situational offensive component rather than a stat item.

display_text: Javelin, Cost: 900: Functions as a counter-item against evasion-heavy targets. Its passive proc can turn engagements against heroes with built-in evasion or early Talismans of Evasion. While its chance-based, the bonus magical damage adds consistent pressure throughout the mid-game.

display_text: Javelin, Cost: 900: Best built on right-clicking heroes who benefit from Monkey King Bar later and need early game anti-evasion. Effective on heroes who lack reliable true strike and rely on frequent attacks to proc its bonus damage, such as ranged agility carries.
